_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Passé bija-é, narekko.
speakFriend.description: Liana Banyan nabangun mangekka terbuka ri sininna basa. Sininna basa nasibawang satu hadiah pallebbangeng.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Laddere basa enreng tarif Marks makkatenni. Marks token partisipasi, de ekuitas.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Pallebbang Liana Banyan ri {{language}}. Waré {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderTitle: Lontara Passé: Aga Elo Makkeda Ko
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Sininna istilah nasibawangi alasan ri lalenna narangi. 26 aseng natinggi.
speakFriend.step1Body: Teruka Hadiah Pallebbangeng ri Help Wanted.
speakFriend.step2Body: Pallebbang sininna string. Kirim ri Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Sanggenna naterima, namawa Marks enreng natulis ri IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Mattitai ada, muttama."

languageSwitcher.tip: Pakéi kata sandi basa laing ri Pakkita Durin!
